title: Filtering & Selecting Data
content_md:
# Selecting Data

```python
df['age']         # column

df[df['age'] > 30]  # filter
```

questions.question: Write code to select the age column.
How do you apply a condition filter?
Why is filtering important in ML?
questions.answer: It isolates the data needed for training.

questions.question: What does df.head() do?
questions.answer: Shows the first rows of the DataFrame.
